parsed.production_notes: The entire video relies on a single static AI-generated image with a talking-head animation applied to the robot face. The surreal scale of the phone, the unnatural lighting, and the perfectly tracked text on the man's back are typical of AI generation.

characters.appearance: A white, humanoid robot face with striking blue eyes and smooth, metallic features. It appears exclusively on the screen of a giant smartphone.
characters.wardrobe: None visible; only the robotic face and neck are shown.

characters.appearance: A young man with a muscular build, dark hair, and a beard. He is seen only from behind.
characters.wardrobe: Shirtless, wearing dark shorts. The words 'ME NO ENGLISH' are written in black on his back.
characters.demeanor: Attentive and seated in a relaxed, cross-legged posture.

scenes.setting: Desert with a large pyramid in the background, daytime, bright sunlight.

panels.panel_visual_description: A shirtless man with dark hair and a beard sits cross-legged on the sand, facing away from the camera. The words 'ME NO ENGLISH' are written in bold black letters across his back. He is looking directly at a giant smartphone standing upright in the sand in front of him. On the phone's large screen is a white, humanoid robot face with striking blue eyes and smooth, metallic features. In the background, a massive stone pyramid stands tall against a clear, cloudless sky. The lighting is bright and sunny, casting distinct shadows on the desert sand. The composition places the man in the foreground and the giant phone in the midground, creating a surreal scale difference.

scenes.visual_description: The scene is a static, AI-generated wide shot of a man sitting in a desert facing a giant smartphone. The robot face on the phone screen is animated with a talking-head effect to lip-sync the dialogue. Throughout the scene, dynamic subtitles appear in the center of the screen, highlighting the spoken words. Various graphic overlays pop up, including a '7X CHEAPER' badge and mockups of the app store listing. A clock icon briefly appears to emphasize the short practice time required. The overall visual remains unchanged except for the animated face and the changing text and UI overlays.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Hello, what is your name?

Character B says: My name is Rahul.

Character A says: How old are you?

Character B says: I have 22.

Character A says: I have 22 नहीं, I am 22 years old होता है। [Not 'I have 22', it should be 'I am 22 years old'.]

Character B says: Okay okay. I am 22 years old.

Character A says: Where are you from?

Character B says: I am Uttar Pradesh.

Character A says: I am Uttar Pradesh नहीं, I am from Uttar Pradesh होगा। [Not 'I am Uttar Pradesh', it will be 'I am from Uttar Pradesh'.]

Character B says: Ohh... ठीक है। मुझे English अच्छे से नहीं आती। [Ohh... okay. I don't know English well.]

Character A says: कोई प्रॉब्लम नहीं। AI teachers try किया? [No problem. Have you tried AI teachers?]

Character B says: वो तो महंगे होते होंगे ना? [They must be expensive, right?]

Character A says: बिल्कुल नहीं। Normal English classes से 7 गुना सस्ता है। इसलिए 50 लाख लोग MySivi पर English practice कर रहे हैं। [Not at all. It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 5 million people are practicing English on MySivi.]

Character B says: पर टाइम नहीं मिलता। [But I don't get time.]

Character A says: रोज़ की सिर्फ 15-20 मिनट की practice काफी है। बिल्कुल confident हो जाओगे। [Just 15-20 minutes of daily practice is enough. You will become completely confident.]

Character B says: Wow, कैसे join करूँ? [Wow, how do I join?]

Character A says: ये install का बटन दबाओ और MySivi app install करो। सिर्फ 15 दिनों में तुम्हें improvement दिखने लगेगी। चलो, शुरू हो जाओ। [Press this install button and install the MySivi app. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. Come on, get started.]

panels.panel_visual_description: A modern smartphone is displayed vertically against a plain, light-colored background. The phone is angled slightly to the left, showing its screen and a thin side profile. The device has a sleek design with minimal bezels and a visible front-facing camera cutout at the top. The lighting is even and studio-like, creating soft highlights on the edges of the phone. The composition is simple and focused entirely on the device in the center of the frame.

scenes.visual_description: This is a standard end-card graphic featuring a smartphone mockup against a clean background. The phone screen displays the app's logo, name, and a prominent call-to-action button. The layout is simple and designed to direct the viewer's attention to the installation prompt. There is no animation or movement in this scene. The visual serves as a final, clear directive for the user to download the app.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: Install now पे क्लिक करो और MySivi app डाउनलोड करो। [Click on install now and download the MySivi app.]
